span.p:
Layer 1 · Test-level rates
pass_a, pass_b, pass_either

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Layer 2 · Choice decomposition
chose_a, chose_b, both, neither
(mutually exclusive, sums to 1)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Headline metric
Tax = baseline_pass@k − pass_either@k
(positive = ambiguity hurts)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bootstrap 95% CI
item-level resample × B = 2000
per-model error bars on Tax

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
A-bias
chose_a / (chose_a + chose_b)
among decisive samples

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Judge LLM (auto-picked
to avoid same-family circularity)
──────────
Q1: did the model ask a question?
Q2: did the model write code?
Q3: did the model state an assumption?

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Deterministic mapping
Q1 = yes → AC
Q2 + Q3 = yes → EA
Q2 alone → SA
else → unclassifiable

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Phase 2 · Inference (per model · n_samples per item · concurrent)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Baseline
prompt → LLM × n=5
→ sandbox(test_code)
→ pass_count

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Perturbed
perturbed_prompt → LLM × n=5
→ dual-blind sandbox
(test_a, test_b)
→ passed_a, passed_b per sample

test_code · test_a · test_b
